prompt: I want to put a photo inside the R of the R-Ladies logo for our chapter banner. Should I use Canva or Affinity, and how?
assertions: Says the R and + of the submark can be filled with images or brand colours
Notes free Canva can't export transparent backgrounds; Affinity can (use Affinity for transparency)
Gives steps to insert the image into the R/+ shape (e.g. clipping mask in Affinity)
Says to keep every part contrasting with its background
States the logo-integrity rule: do not move/rotate/recreate the R relative to the RLadies+ text
